title: Disc Jockeys, Except Radio
description: Play prerecorded music for live audiences at venues or events such as clubs, parties, or wedding receptions. May use techniques such as mixing, cutting, or sampling to manipulate recordings. May also perform as emcee (master of ceremonies).

tasks.text: Accept music requests from event guests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adhere to schedules to keep events running on time.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advertise services using media such as internet advertising and brochures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Communicate with clients or venue owners to determine event information, such as music preferences, scheduling, and anticipated attendance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct sound checks to ensure equipment is working and appropriate for the venue.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create itemized invoices to record amounts due for services rendered.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Create tailored playlists by aligning music with event functions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Encourage guests to dance using group dances, competitions, or other party games.

tasks.text: Lead party games, such as dance-offs or prize giveaways.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Listen to music before playing at events to ensure recordings are appropriate and meet quality standards.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Maintain up-to-date knowledge of music releases and trends.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix, cut, or sample recorded music using DJ controllers, CDJs, or DJ mixers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Operate disc jockey controller and other equipment, such as microphones.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate visual effects equipment, such as lights, fog machines, or lasers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select and play music incorporating crowd preferences and mood.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
